title: Senior Frontend Developer at Apollo Telehealth

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Apollo Telehealth
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Apollo Telehealth! We are hiring a Frontend Developer for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Apollo Telehealth:
Apollo Telehealth is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
